name: Japanese Fruit Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs well.
2. Add sugar and beat until combined.
3. Incorporate melted margarine, raisins, coconut, and chopped pecans.
4. Stir in vanilla extract and vinegar.
5. Pour the mixture into the ungreased pie shell.
6. Place the pie on a baking sheet or foil before baking to prevent overflow.
7. Bake at 300°F for 45 minutes.
